deadline_notes: Triennial. CPE year: July 1 – June 30. License renewal by June 30. Rolling 3-year lookback.
notes: 8hr ethics per cycle (double the 4hr national norm). 60hr technical minimum (50%). 24hr group/blended learning minimum. 72hr approved-sponsor minimum. No carryforward. Carryback allowed with fees. ~25K MN CPAs.
